name: Powder Keg
description: This model gains the following action:

granted_actions.name: Explosive Surprise
granted_actions.effects: Make a Scheme marker within range. Enemy models within (Y)2" of the made marker must pass a TN 14 Sp duel or be dealt 2 damage. Then, if this action did not receive a raise, remove the marker and discard this upgrade.

extraction_notes: The Rst column shows '-' indicating this is a tactical action with no resist stat
The action icon appears to be a tactical action marker based on the stats (TN 6, no resist, no damage in stat line)
Damage (2 damage) is dealt as part of the effect, not as a direct damage stat
Limitations shows '-' which indicates no specific limitations apply
